title: Post-M8 UI playability remediation closeout
summary: Close the post-M8 UI remediation only after every remediation task is independently reviewed, integrated, validated, merged to main and pushed.
acceptance: All post-M8 UI remediation tasks are done, independently reviewed as verified and integrated
Final closeout report records UI readiness, playability readiness, i18n readiness, responsive readiness, remaining art needs and release-candidate audit eligibility

Full required gates pass, including handoff validation, task validation/status, diff check, quality, focused E2E/selection/camera/language tests, M5 invariants, bench and M5 alpha scenario run where applicable
main and origin/main are synchronized after merge/push
No public release, EA, store, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services or public save compatibility action is executed

history.details: Closed post-M8 UI/playability remediation evidence; WM-0129..WM-0141 done/verified/integrated; focused Web E2E, quality, ci:local, M5 invariants, warmed benchmark confirmations, M5 100000-tick scenario, handoff/taskctl/status and diff check pass; public gates preserved.

verified: No blocking findings; WM-0129..WM-0141 are done, independently verified and integrated by project-director; WM-0142 readiness/gate evidence is recorded accurately; cold benchmark failures are documented and two warmed confirmations pass without threshold/baseline changes; public gates and no-WM-0145 control-plane boundary preserved.

forbiddenPaths: telemetry, accounts, hosted feedback or paid services
changing Web demo-only or Windows controlled-test verdicts without owner approval

review.summary: No blocking findings; WM-0129..WM-0141 are done, independently verified and integrated by project-director; WM-0142 readiness/gate evidence is recorded accurately; cold benchmark failures are documented and two warmed confirmations pass without threshold/baseline changes; public gates and no-WM-0145 control-plane boundary preserved.
